metadata.description: thewhyman/agent-marketplace — author-scoped marketplace for all thewhyman-authored Claude Code units. Hosts the xOS plugin family (xTeamOS, xHumanOS, xFamilyOS, xCommunityOS) plus standalone tools (Co-Dialectic) and apps (Career-OS). Marketplace name 'thewhyman' is author-scoped — install reads as @thewhyman regardless of plugin family.

plugins.name: co-dialectic
plugins.description: Co-Dialectic v3 — LLM prompt optimizer + cross-family cascade-then-jury review (judge-panel) + hallucination detector. Socratic coaching, persona detection, context management, prompt improvement, and Defense-in-Depth verification across any AI.

plugins.name: career-os
plugins.description: Career OS — AI-powered career management system. The operating system for your career — persistent memory, session capture, git-versioned data, full privacy. v0.24.0 file-only substrate + biographical-claim precheck.
